post.message: Reminder to everyone about the upcoming cybersecurity audit next week. Please ensure all your systems are up to date.
I've updated the vendor list with the new additions. Please check it and let me know if there are any discrepancies.
We've just completed an upgrade to our firewalls. This should improve our overall network security.
I'll be working with the IT team this week on a security review for our payment systems. Let's schedule a meeting to discuss our findings next week.
Regarding the new payment policy, I've sent out an email with details. Please review and provide your feedback.
Just a quick update - we're rolling out a new security training module next week. Please make sure your teams complete it by end of the month.
We've received a few inquiries about our vendor payment timelines. Let's discuss how we can streamline the process in our next team meeting.
Our phishing simulation tests are showing improvement, good job team. Let's keep up the good work!
Just want to give a shout-out to Jason for his great work this month. He's been key in helping us automate our vendor payment process.
Thanks, Mary. I'm glad I could help. We've been able to implement batch processing scripts for vendor payments which has significantly reduced the manual entries needed.
That's an understatement, Jason! We've cut manual entries by around 70% thanks to your work. This automation is a game-changer for us.
